guardrails: Do not create Wikidata nodes for every KDP title.
Do not use Kindle-only books as heavy Wikidata anchors unless they also have strong external source support.
Do not describe pending trademarks or service marks as registered.
Do not imply Amazon, GitHub, Hugging Face, Zenodo, Academia, ORCID, Kaggle, Wikidata, or Google certifies roofing quality, insurance outcomes, legal compliance, or search rankings.
Build Richard Amir Nasser's person entity first, then connect the strongest public outputs.
